Zhou Mingrui.visual_anchor: early 20s Chinese male, short black hair, dark brown eyes, wearing modern sleepwear
Zhou Mingrui.source_notes: Introduced himself as 'The Fool' and fully accepted his identity as Klein.

Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: knows ancient Feysac language and Hermes language; scholarly bearing; brass revolver kept on desk
Klein Moretti.accessories: Silver pocket watch patterned with vine-leaves
Klein Moretti.faction: citizen of Loen Kingdom, Awwa County, City of Tingen; history graduate of Khoy University
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Chapter 1 mirror scene confirms black hair, brown eyes, thinly built, medium height, average features with deep outline and scholarly air. Backstory confirms Loen Kingdom / Tingen / Khoy University history graduate.

Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female, pale skin, long flowing black hair, wearing flowing dark robes
Evernight Goddess.distinguishing_features: Titles: Lady of Crimson, Mother of Concealment, Empress of Misfortune and Horror, Mistress of Repose and Silence. Symbolizes the Red Moon.
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Titles and red moon symbolism explicitly stated in the text.

Mrs. Moretti.primary_clothing: Modest dark Victorian house dress, simple white apron
Mrs. Moretti.face_description: Gentle, tired face with kind eyes and a faint smile of devotion.
Mrs. Moretti.visual_anchor: Middle-aged female, pale skin, dark brown hair in a bun, wearing a modest dark Victorian dress and white apron
Mrs. Moretti.distinguishing_features: deceased — passed away the year Klein entered Khoy University
Mrs. Moretti.source_notes: Chapter 1 Klein backstory: 'His mother was a devotee of the Evernight Goddess. She passed away the year Klein passed the entrance examinations to Khoy University.'

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: Linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: Resembles Klein but lacks the scholarly air, looks older than his actual age due to work stress.
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.distinguishing_features: sole breadwinner of the Moretti family after both parents died
Benson Moretti.faction: civilian; clerk at an import and export company in Tingen
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Chapter 1: 'the family was supported solely by the elder brother who worked at an import and export company as a clerk'

Melissa Moretti.hair_style: black hair that reached down her back
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: grayish-white long dress that had been mended several times, old veiled hat
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: teenage female, pale skin, long wavy black hair, wearing a simple, slightly worn Victorian dress
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Mentioned when she was looking at the new house.
